subject: Social Science (CBSE - History & Civics)
chapter: Social and Political Life – II: Understanding Media

activities_projects.title: Newspaper Analysis Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand different types of news and media reporting
steps: Collect a newspaper
Identify different sections: local news, national news, sports, entertainment
Highlight one news story from each section and write a summary
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to differentiate types of news and reporting styles
activities_projects.evaluation: Completeness of sections and accuracy of summaries (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Media Source Identification
steps: List five sources of information: newspapers, TV, radio, social media, magazines
Write one advantage and one limitation of each source
Share findings in class
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand different media sources and their reliability
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and accuracy of identification (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Create a Mini Newspaper
activities_projects.objective: Develop reporting and creative writing skills
steps: Prepare a mini newspaper with 3–4 articles
Include sections like news, sports, entertainment, and editor’s note
Design the layout creatively
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students practice organizing information and writing news articles
activities_projects.evaluation: Creativity, clarity, and completeness of newspaper (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Media Bias Observation
activities_projects.objective: Identify bias or opinion in media reports
steps: Select two news articles on the same topic from different sources
Compare language, tone, and focus
Write a short note on any bias observed
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop critical thinking regarding media representation
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and depth of observation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Role-play: Journalist and Editor
activities_projects.objective: Understand the responsibilities of media personnel
steps: Divide the class into journalists and editors
Prepare short news stories and edit them collaboratively
Discuss challenges faced in reporting and editing
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students appreciate the process of news production
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation, collaboration, and understanding of roles (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Social Media Information Check
activities_projects.objective: Learn to verify information on social media
steps: Select one trending news or post on social media
Check if the information is from a credible source
Write a short note on how to verify information online
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of checking sources online
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and explanation of verification steps (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Media Vocabulary Activity
steps: List 10 key terms such as journalist, editor, headline, press, censorship
Write definitions in your own words
Create a word search or crossword using the terms
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students strengthen vocabulary related to media
activities_projects.evaluation: Correctness of definitions and puzzle effort (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Interview Activity
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of interviews in news reporting
steps: Prepare 5 questions for a local community member
Conduct a short interview
Write a brief news report based on the interview
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn to collect information and report accurately
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and report writing (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Analyze Advertisement Messages
steps: Select one advertisement
Identify the message it conveys and the target audience
Discuss whether the message is informative, persuasive, or biased
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students develop awareness of media influence and persuasion

activities_projects.title: Mini Quiz on Media
steps: Prepare 10 simple questions from the chapter
Ask classmates to answer them
Keep score for correct answers
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students reinforce knowledge through peer learning
